description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages init and build. In the init stage add an init job using the php:7.2-cli image that runs `apt-get update && apt-get install -y unzip git curl`, then conditionally downloads Composer via `curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --filename=composer` if the composer file is missing, and runs `php composer install`; cache the `vendor/` directory and also publish it as an artifact that expires in 10 minutes. In the build stage add a build job using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, limited to the master branch, dependent on init, that executes `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`, `docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest .`, `docker run -e TEST='true' $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest php createRelease.php`, `docker run -e TEST='true' $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest php uploadBinary.php`, and `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest` to publish the image to the GitLab Container Registry.
